case_title: DEBRA ANN HUNT VS. MISAEL URBINA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNT, DEBRA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT URBINA, MISAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-02-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-16-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNT, DEBRA ANN SERVED JAN-17-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URBINA, MISAEL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-02-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-20-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
